canonical_text: The development of AGI is the most important event in human history
subject: Max Tegmark
verdict: Compelling rhetoric but unfalsifiable grand claim

canonical_text: AI safety research should be prioritized over capability research
subject: Max Tegmark
verdict: Reasonable argument contradicted by market reality

canonical_text: The future of AI depends on choices we make now
subject: Max Tegmark
verdict: Philosophically sound, practically naive about incentive structures
